overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a forest trail during a stormy dusk. The character traverses from a wooded hillside path to a rocky cliff edge overlooking a misty valley with dramatic lightning visible in the distance.

events.description: lightning flashes in the distant storm clouds

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt path through the forested hillside, heading toward higher ground

entered.detail: tall trees with green foliage lining the left side of the trail
tall trees with green foliage lining the right side of the trail
narrow dirt trail winding through the grassy hillside
tall green grass and bushes alongside the path
large boulders and rocky outcrops on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through a forested hillside during a storm. Tall deciduous trees line both sides of the path with grassy undergrowth, while large rock formations appear on the right. Lightning flashes occasionally in the partially visible stormy sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff overlook with panoramic valley view

events.description: emerges from forest trail onto rocky cliff edge with open vista
character stops walking and stands at cliff edge to observe the view
lightning strikes visible in the distant storm clouds over the valley

agents.ego_description: reaches the cliff edge and stops to survey the stormy valley and distant mountains, occasionally looking around

entered.detail: rocky precipice with wet stone surface overlooking the valley
expansive view of misty valley with forest canopy below
mountain silhouettes visible through the storm haze
dark dramatic storm clouds with visible lightning

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the forest onto a rocky cliff edge, revealing a panoramic view of a misty valley and distant mountains under a dramatic stormy sky. The character stops to observe the landscape as lightning flashes in the distance, standing on wet rocks at the precipice.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic forested trail that opens into a vast, storm-swept mountain vista. It begins by trailing a character along a narrow dirt path through a hillside forest, where tall deciduous trees and grassy undergrowth flank the route beside large rock formations. As the character advances, the dense canopy thins and the path leads directly out of the woods, shifting the perspective from the enclosed trail to the open air. The scene then expands as the character reaches a rocky cliff edge, revealing a panoramic view of a misty valley and distant mountains under a dramatic sky. Finally, the camera lingers on the character standing atop the wet precipice while lightning flashes across the distant horizon.
